briefdescription.para: Opens the low level driver.

simplesect.para: Handle of the low level driver; NULL on failure

briefdescription.para: Closes the low level driver.
Tell HAL about another user of the low level driver.
Tell HAL about departed user of the low level driver.
Returns the number of connected cameras.

parameterdescription.para: Select negative edge of incoming PClk to sample camera data.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 dev_mask, bool power_lowact, bool reset_lowact, bool pclk_negedge)
memberdef.name: HalSetCamConfig

briefdescription.para: Sets the configuration of the given CAM devices.

parameterdescription.para: Mask of CAM devices to set the configuration for.
CAM power on signal is low-active
CAM reset signal is low-active
Select negative edge of incoming PClk to sample camera data

briefdescription.para: Sets the configuration of the given CAM PHY devices.

parameterdescription.para: Mask of CAM PHY devices to set the configuration for.
CAM PHY power on signal is low-active.
CAM PHY reset signal is low-active.

briefdescription.para: Enables/Disables reset of the given devices.

parameterdescription.para: Mask of devices to change reset state
Enable or disable reset of the specified devices.

briefdescription.para: Enables/Disables power of the given devices.

parameterdescription.para: Mask of devices to change power state
Enable or disable power of the specified devices.

briefdescription.para: Enables and sets/disables clock of the given devices.

parameterdescription.para: Mask of devices to change clock settings for
Sets frequency of given clocks in Hz steps.

briefdescription.para: Reads a value from the specified address.

parameterdescription.para: Full address (base address + offset) of register to read

simplesect.para: The value read from the register

briefdescription.para: Writes a value to a given address.

parameterdescription.para: Full address (base address + offset) of register to write.
Value to write into register

briefdescription.para: Reads a value from a specific part of the given address.

parameterdescription.para: Full address (base address + offset) of register to read.
Mask to apply to register value after being read
Amount to right shift masked register value prior to being returned

simplesect.para: The masked and shifted value of the specified register that is read

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 reg_address, u32 reg_mask, u32 shift_mask, u32 value)
memberdef.name: HalWriteMaskedReg

briefdescription.para: Writes a value to a specific part of the given address.

parameterdescription.para: Full address (base address + offset) of register to write
Mask to isolate parts of the register that should be written
Amount to left shift the value prior to being modified in the register
Value to write into the specified register position

briefdescription.para: Reads a value from a given system register.

parameterdescription.para: Full address (base address + offset) of system register to read

simplesect.para: The value read from the system register

briefdescription.para: Writes a value to a given system register.

parameterdescription.para: Full address (base address + offset) of system register to write
Value to write into the register

briefdescription.para: Allocates the given amount of hardware memory.

parameterdescription.para: Amount of memory to allocate

simplesect.para: mem_address - memory block start address in hardware memory; 0 on failure

briefdescription.para: Frees the given block of hardware memory.

parameterdescription.para: Start address of memory block in hardware memory

briefdescription.para: Reads a number of data from the memory to a buffer starting at the given address.

parameterdescription.para: Source start address in hardware memory
Pointer to local memory holding the data being read
Amount of data to read

briefdescription.para: Writes a number of data from the memory to a buffer starting at the given address.

parameterdescription.para: Target start address in hardware memory
Pointer to local memory holding the data to be written
Amount of data to write

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 mem_address, u32 byte_size, HalMapMemType_t mapping_type, void **pp_mapped_buf)
memberdef.name: HalMapMemory

briefdescription.para: Maps a number of data from the memory into local memory starting at the given address.

parameterdescription.para: Source start address in hardware memory
Amount of data to map
The way the mapping is performed
Reference to pointer to the mapped local memory

briefdescription.para: Unmaps previously mapped memory from local memory.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to local memory to unmap as returned by HalMapMemory

memberdef.argsstring: (u8 bus_num, u16 slave_addr, u32 reg_address, u8 reg_addr_size, u8 *p_read_buffer, u32 byte_size)
memberdef.name: HalReadI2CMem

briefdescription.para: Reads a number of data from the memory to a buffer starting at the given address.

parameterdescription.para: Number of bus which is to be used
Address of slave to be accessed
Address of register to read
Size of reg_address in bytes. Valid range: [0..4] bytes.
Pointer to local memory holding the data being read
Amount of data to read

memberdef.argsstring: (u8 bus_num, u16 slave_addr, u32 reg_address, u8 reg_addr_size, u8 *p_write_buffer, u32 byte_size)
memberdef.name: HalWriteI2CMem

briefdescription.para: Writes a number of data from a buffer to the memory starting at the given address.

parameterdescription.para: Number of bus which is to be used
Address of slave to be accessed
Address of register to write
Size of reg_address in bytes. Valid range: [0..4] bytes.
Pointer to local memory holding the data being written
Amount of data to read

briefdescription.para: Register an interrupt service routine with the system software.

parameterdescription.para: Reference of HAL IRQ context structure that represent this connection
Number of the interrupt source, set to 0 if not needed
First interrupt routine, (first level handler); set to NULL if not needed
Second interrupt routine (second level handler)
Context provided when the interrupt routines are called

simplesect.para: Status of operation Deregister an interrupt service routine from the system software

parameterdescription.para: Reference of HAL IRQ context structure that represent this connection

memberdef.argsstring: (u8 bus_num, u8 slave_addr, u32 reg_address, u8 reg_addr_size, void *preg_value, u8 reg_size)
memberdef.name: HalXilReadI2CReg

briefdescription.para: Reads a number of data from the memory to a buffer starting at the given address.

parameterdescription.para: Number of bus which is to be used
Address of slave to be accessed (supports auto detection of 10bit addresses)
Address of register to read. The register data gets read starting with the least significant byte
Size of reg_address in bytes. Valid range: [0..4] bytes
Pointer to local memory holding the register data being read
Size of register in bytes. Valid range: [1..4].

memberdef.argsstring: (u8 bus_num, u8 slave_addr, u16 reg_address, u8 reg_addr_size, u8 reg_value, u32 reg_size)
memberdef.name: HalXilWriteI2CReg

briefdescription.para: Writes a number of data from a buffer to the memory starting at the given address.

parameterdescription.para: Number of bus which is to be used
Address of slave to be accessed (supports auto detection of 10bit addresses)
Address of register to write. The register data gets written starting with the least significant byte.
Size of reg_address in bytes. Valid range: [0..4] bytes
Pointer to local memory holding the register data being written
Size of register in bytes. Valid range: [1..4].
